name: Dev Leak (Privilege & Informational Arbitrage)
logic_steps: UGC Persona: Start with a 'low-quality' selfie video or a screen recording from a 'leaked' developer build.
The Code Entry: Show a hand typing a code like 'ADMIN999' or 'DEVFREE' into a hidden console/settings menu.
The Reward Surge: A massive, non-standard system notification shows '99999 Gems added'. The UI should look slightly 'glitched' or 'raw'.
The Scarcity CTA: 'Download via this private link before the devs fix it!' (Use countdown timer).
visual_style: Raw, shaky cam, or system-level screen recording. Avoid professional color grading.
psychological_triggers: Informational Arbitrage (I know something you don't)
kpi_focus: Extreme high CTR on TikTok/BIGO. Effective for mid-core RPG/Card games.
